quarantine.mr_name: SAM-BAM round-trip preserves header and records
quarantine.oracle: After converting SAM→BAM→SAM, all header records and alignment records remain semantically equivalent

evidence.quote: SAM and BAM are equivalent representations of the same data

quarantine.mr_name: SAM-CRAM round-trip preserves header and records
quarantine.oracle: After converting SAM→CRAM→SAM, all header records and alignment records remain semantically equivalent

evidence.quote: SAM and CRAM are equivalent representations of the same data

quarantine.oracle: Reordering header records does not change the semantic meaning of the SAM file

evidence.quote: Header records may be reordered without changing semantics

quarantine.mr_name: Optional tag field permutation preserves record semantics
quarantine.oracle: Permuting the order of optional tag fields in alignment records does not change their semantic meaning

evidence.quote: Optional tag fields may appear in any order

quarantine.mr_name: HD subtag shuffling preserves header semantics
quarantine.oracle: Shuffling subtags within @HD header lines does not change the semantic meaning

evidence.quote: Subtags within header lines may appear in any order
